AI Labs

AI Labs contains experimental prototypes exploring emerging AI capabilities before they become full production products.

AIPrototypeExperiment

SleepSense

Description

AI-powered system transforming messy sleep notes into structured insights and patterns.

Takeaway

Experiment exploring how LLMs can convert unstructured personal health notes into structured behavioral insights.

View Experiment
Experiment Hub

Rellos Experiment Hub

Description

A collection of AI experiments, product explorations, and learnings from tools and workflows I test. This hub acts as a personal lab notebook where I document experiments, notes, and insights from AI products I explore.

Takeaway

A living record of how I explore, evaluate, and learn from emerging AI tools and product patterns.

Explore Experiments
AgentsAutomationEval

Agentic Email Sorter

Description

An autonomous agent that triages incoming emails based on custom priority rules.

Takeaway

Demonstrates how I design agentic workflows with evaluation hooks and safety guardrails.

View Experiment
RAGDataLLMs

RAG Financial Analyst

Description

Retrieval-Augmented Generation over 10-K filings to auto-answer investor queries.

Takeaway

Showcases my approach to building cost-effective RAG systems tailored for complex documents.

View Experiment
